name: Diana, Princess of Wales
title: Last known photo of Diana, Princess of Wales, taken as she left the Ritz Paris on August 31, 1997.
description: Diana, Princess of Wales, was photographed leaving the Ritz Paris hotel in the early hours of August 31, 1997, accompanied by Dodi Fayed. They departed through the rear exit to avoid paparazzi, entering a Mercedes-Benz S280 driven by Henri Paul. While speeding through the Pont de l'Alma tunnel, the car crashed into a pillar at an estimated 65 mph. Dodi and Henri Paul were killed instantly. Diana was pulled from the wreckage alive but died at Pitié-Salpêtrière Hospital a few hours later. She was 36 years old.
bio: Diana, Princess of Wales, was a member of the British royal family and a global humanitarian icon. Her charity work, particularly with AIDS patients and landmine victims, earned her the title "People's Princess".
